nodes.name: Apify Company Page Posts
nodes.notes: FIXED actor: harvestapi/linkedin-company-posts with targetUrls (company page URL). NOT linkedin-post-search. Put Apify token in n8n credential/env — never hardcode.

nodes.name: POST Dashboard LinkedIn Ingest
nodes.notes: Set DASHBOARD_URL (e.g. http://localhost:3000 or your deploy URL) and INGEST_SECRET in n8n env. Retries 3x with backoff.
